tickets.title: Invoice poster retries forever on validation errors
tickets.description: When the billing API returns a 400 for a malformed invoice, the poster keeps retrying the same payload every 30s until someone restarts the service. It should dead-letter the invoice after 3 attempts and alert. Seen in prod on 6/28, ~1400 retries for one invoice.

tickets.title: Add CSV export to the reconciliation report
tickets.description: Finance wants to download the monthly reconciliation report as CSV. Same columns as the on-screen table, filename recon-YYYY-MM.csv. Nice to have: respect the active filters.

tickets.title: PROD: nightly sync job failing since certificate rotation
tickets.description: The 2am partner-data sync has failed 3 nights running with TLS handshake errors after IT rotated the outbound proxy cert on 7/1. Partner data is now 3 days stale and support is getting calls. Need the job pointed at the new CA bundle and a check that catches this class of failure faster.

tickets.title: QA pass on the new customer-merge flow
tickets.description: Customer merge shipped behind a flag last sprint. Before enabling for everyone: verify address/contact dedup rules, audit-log entries, and that merged customers keep their open orders. Write down whatever you check so we can repeat it next release.

tickets.title: Upgrade CI runners to .NET 8 SDK
tickets.description: Build agents still have .NET 6 SDK only. The Billing and CRM pipelines need the 8.0 SDK image, and global.json files should be updated to match. Watch out: the legacy PDF service must stay on 6.
